text: 41. Countertops may not be shimmed except at knee wall locations for support only. Countertops shall not be shimmed for  levelness.    Cabinets  shall  be  adjusted  to  ensure  level  countertop.  Subcontractor  shall  check  cabinets  for levelness and provide a list of issues/discrepancies to Contractor. Cabinets that are not level shall be brought to the  attention  of  the  Contractor's  Superintendent  immediately  in  writing.  The  final  height  and  clearance  of  the countertop shall meet all ANSI, FHA, and ADA requirements. Subcontractor shall verify height and clearance at kitchens and bathrooms prior to setting of countertops.  Subcontractor understands that once the countertop has been installed and if it is out of level, all re-work associated with removal and re-installation of the countertops shall be the Subcontractor's responsibility.
